source: To allow for US initiatives, EU foreign ministers have not commented on the stalemate between Israel and the Palestinians over past months; but, diplomatic sources say there are “sensitivities" over a Swedish proposal to divide Jerusalem in any peace deal.

source: Scientists at NASA say that new satellite images of Saturn's moon Enceladus taken in 2005, has shown that the moon has begun to spew geysers which contain liquid water, and that the internal heat produced by the moon's core may be able to host life below the icy surface, but scientists also stress that life has not yet been found on the moon.

Mr. Haddox told us that the size of the hole is much smaller than the 330 feet depth originally reported and that the erosion causing the collapse is believed to have happened over a long time, and not just during the recent rains as initially suspected.

Mr. Haddox memberitahu kami bahwa saiz lubang adalah lebih kecil daripada kedalaman 330 kaki yang asalnya dilaporkan dan hakisan penyebab kepada runtuhan adalah dipercayai berlaku sejak satu tempoh masa yang lama, dan tidak hanya semasa hujan baru-baru ini seperti yang disyaki di peringkat awal.

source: Theories have been around since the 1940s that childhood exposure to infection was related to the development of childhood leukaemia — one, like the working theory of the UK study, said that lack of immune challenge was a factor, another that leukaemia developed as a delayed result of some type of infection.

foreignization: Teori-teori telah wujud sejak tahun 1940-an yang mengatakan pendedahan kanak-kanak kepada jangkitan berkaitan dengan perkembangan leukemia kanak-kanak — satu teori, seperti teori kerja kajian United Kingdom, menyatakan bahawa kekurangan cabaran imun adalah faktor, manakala teori lain menyatakan leukemia berkembang sebagai hasil lewat daripada sesuatu jenis jangkitan.

messages_foreignization.content:
Translate the following text to Malay:

Theories have been around since the 1940s that childhood exposure to infection was related to the development of childhood leukaemia — one, like the working theory of the UK study, said that lack of immune challenge was a factor, another that leukaemia developed as a delayed result of some type of infection.

Penemuan ini menyokong teori penyelidik bahawa pengurangan pendedahan kepada jangkitan biasa pada tahun pertama kehidupan meningkatkan risiko untuk menghidap leukemia limfoblastik akut (ALL).

Translate the following text to Malay:

The finding supports the researchers' theory that reduced exposure to common infections in the first year of life increases the risk of developing acute lymphoblastic leukaemia (ALL).
Dapatan ini menyokong teori penyelidik yang mengurangkan pendedahan kepada jangkitan biasa pada tahun pertama kehidupan meningkatkan risiko mendapat leukemia lymphoblastic akut (ALL).
